subject: New Opening: Software Engineer – Java – Gaming
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the gaming sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a senior Software Engineer with strong experience in Java. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:

  • Java
  • GCP
  • Kubernetes

Details:
Client: FrostByte Games
Start: 2021-12-07
Duration: 3 months
Location: Stockholm (remote)
Rate: up to 900 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Johan Bergström
Konsultchef
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 76 456 78 90
